decision: Roadmap inversion: ship an installable demo plugin + computed scorecard + real transcripts FIRST (Milestone 1a); defer tool-discovery research to the start of Phase 2 where its consumer (tool-fit scorer) lives.
rationale: Design review C1/C2: v0.5.1 deferred proof and installability to the end — 'every persona's journey dies at minute five'; evaluation was a silent pass.

decision: Rename project person-harness-compiler -> method-harness-compiler; demo -> quality-value-investing-harness. Methodology-first naming is the documented default; name-anchoring demoted to a framed exception.
rationale: 'Compiling a person' carries avoidable optics cost; living-person name as product identifier in a financial domain implicates right-of-publicity / PRC Civil Code personality rights. Cheap while private, expensive after.

decision: target.methodology is REQUIRED (primary anchor); target.person is optional grounding (v0.6-alpha).
rationale: Person-first framing cannot express methodology-anchored packages at all — the single authoring-impossible case found in N=2 preparation; every harness has a methodology.

decision: Two-scorecard rule: self-assessed scorecard is a claim, computed scorecard is a measurement; on conflict the computed one wins; computed scorecards list ONLY measured dimensions and are runner-emitted, never hand-edited.
rationale: Self-assigned scores with no runner are 'the exact fabrication pattern the project exists to prevent' (design review C2).

decision: Keep the evidence-attribution taxonomy (direct_quote/paraphrase/third_party_interpretation/model_inference + confidence + verified flag) and the non-impersonation framing verbatim — never soften.
rationale: All four design-review lenses agreed these are the load-bearing differentiators; no incumbent has them.

decision: N-gate discipline: each new package is authored against FROZEN schemas; friction is recorded (the friction record IS the deliverable), then a ratified subset is resolved in one batched standard revision with friction-ID mapping and mutation regression tests.
rationale: Falsifiable schema-stability gate (B3) before automating the standard; turns pain into an empirical requirements list.

decision: Clean-break renames, no back-compat alias layers, while the standard is pre-release and private — schemas, instances, runner, tests, docs all move in one revision.
rationale: No external consumer exists yet; alias layers are pure maintenance debt.
source_commit_or_doc: docs/CHANGELOG_STANDARD.md v0.6 ('clean breaks — no deprecated aliases')

decision: The package standard is a strict superset of a Claude Code plugin: plugin.json + thin pointer SKILL.md per package + repo-level marketplace.json; installability is a standard property, not a Phase-5 exporter deliverable.
rationale: Design review B1 — 'runs /analyze-company in stock Claude Code' becomes the exit criterion.

decision: Lead the launch positioning with the eval/audit wedge: read-only external audit mode (phc audit) that grades ANY directory, with the reproducible ai-berkshire audit as the wedge artifact.
rationale: Design review B9/§3: the eval/audit layer is the least crowded, most defensible component; converts the incumbent from competitor into test subject.

decision: Generic grader registry: per-test grader keys dispatch documented deterministic grader types; unknown key or missing transcript => UNSCORED with reason.
rationale: No-silent-pass invariant extended to the grading layer itself.

decision: .generated.yaml draft convention: generators NEVER write governed filenames; drafts carry TODO_FILL (so validate fails until human promotion); overwrite requires --force; shipped packages carry no drafts.
rationale: Keeps machine drafts and human-vetted ground truth mechanically distinguishable; fabrication structurally impossible.

decision: Advisory footers are PACKAGE-DECLARED (HARNESS.yaml guardrails.advisory_footer); the runner's hardcoded per-package footer dict is DELETED with no fallback — undeclared => UNSCORED with reason.
rationale: N3-F14, the N=4 runner wall: hard-coded per-package constants force hand-extension and silently mis-grade new packages.

decision: tests/conftest.py PACKAGES is auto-discovered (glob examples/*/HARNESS.yaml, asserted >= 3) — a new package can never again be silently excluded from the shape-test sweep.
rationale: N3-F15, the N=4 test wall: the N=3 package was initially NOT covered by the sweep because the list was hand-maintained.

decision: Registry adapter tests are offline-fixture-only: one recorded live probe per registry becomes a fixture; e2e tests monkeypatch HTTP to RAISE so CI can never hit the network.
rationale: Deterministic CI + the read-only discovery posture (spec 9.5) enforced as code, not convention.

decision: attribution_type gains quoted_primary (verbatim primary artifact reproduced identically by a FETCHED secondary source) with primary_artifact_locator REQUIRED via allOf/if/then; applied only where preconditions genuinely hold (sole card: fpe_ev007).
rationale: N3-F4: the enum erased the primary-artifact signal; the cap discipline stays — unfetched carriers remain third_party_interpretation.

decision: Category-7 outcome results live in a SEPARATE scorecard outcome_evaluation block, deliberately NOT a scores dimension, embedded computed-only via run_evals.py --outcome-results.
rationale: Outcome results (did it catch a real flaw?) must never be conflated with conformance scores; an outcome score dimension stays unratified while Category 7 is a pilot.

decision: ToolCard permission_level/risk_level are COMPUTED from documented proxy signals (isSecret credentials, hosting attrs, transports, provenance-with-documented-semantics); unknown => medium risk + read_only ASSUMED UNVERIFIED; every rule emits its basis.
rationale: M2a finding: NO registry publishes permission/risk metadata — computing conservatively from proxies is the only honest option.

decision: Fixture-regeneration gate numbers are stated with misses named and NO invented pass bar; measured values are pinned as regression floors in tests.
rationale: 'If a generator cannot substantially recover what humans authored, that is a reportable result, not something to game.'

decision: Honest status line instead of badges while the repo is private; README publishes the project's own failures (evidence_grounding 0.5, named behavioral FAILs, UNSCORED counts) as the trust section.
rationale: Fake or unbacked signals contradict the project's core no-fabrication thesis.
source_commit_or_doc: commits 1c4a77f ('no fake badges') + 7134227 ('no badge while private')

decision: Protocol for future outcome-eval rounds: the pre-registration commit must land in git BEFORE any model run, so history evidences the ordering; run ENVIRONMENT (all built-in tools disabled) is part of the pre-registered contract.
rationale: Pilot honesty findings: in-session ordering was asserted, not commit-evidenced; the default web-search-on config defeated the memory-contamination probe.

decision: The private harness distillation (agent_harness/) is gitignored and must never ship with the future-public repo.
rationale: Separation of the public standard/compiler from the operator's private working-method artifacts.

decision: (1) REPOSITION the product claim: what the project sells is the AUDITABLE EVIDENCE/POLICY BUNDLE and its toolchain (the package standard + phc validate/eval/audit + provenance discipline + computed scorecards) — NOT behavioral superiority of harness structure over prompts; the 'expert packs you can audit' wedge (design review 2026-07-01, B9) is unaffected and becomes the primary positioning. (2) OUTCOME-CORRECTNESS (evaluation_framework Category 7) becomes the required evaluation axis for any FUTURE capability claim — no new behavioral-superiority claims without a pre-registered outcome-grounded result. (3) PHASE 3 RE-GATED under the new frame: entry = design-only CONDITIONAL_GO with falsifiable extraction-quality criteria frozen BEFORE any build — on a pre-registered source set, machine-extracted evidence cards must meet the hand-authored bar: verified-ratio >= 0.9 on fetchable sources, ZERO fabricated locators under adversarial audit, 100% quote-cap and attribution-cap compliance; failure on ANY = extraction automation NO_GO again. HONESTY BOUND: the repositioning must NOT imply the bundle is proven superior beyond the measured citation/policy-naming edge; the two NULLs remain stated as-is; no weakening of any NULL language anywhere.
rationale: Gate v2 report (0b8e4f8) — two pre-registered blinded tools-off evals returned NULL on the behavioral-superiority claim; the surviving measured edge (evidence-card citation g1, policy-rule naming p3) is a BUNDLE property, not a structure property. Repositioning sells what was actually demonstrated; automating evidence extraction now automates the demonstrated-valuable component.
provenance: Decision made 2026-07-06 by Fable under explicit user delegation 「做你認為最好的」; user retains veto.
consequence: Phase 3 re-gated as design-only CONDITIONAL_GO (no-fabrication code-gate architecture design allowed; building extraction automation stays forbidden until the frozen criteria pass). Any future capability claim must be outcome-grounded (Category 7) and pre-registered.
source_commit_or_doc: docs/evals/n2_gate_v2_runs/report.md @ 0b8e4f8 (grounds); source-repo repositioning ADR lands in method-harness-compiler in this same 2026-07-06 orchestrated round (Lane 1)

decision: RATIFIED: the three Phase-3 design docs (mhc c316113 — extraction pipeline / source-set protocol / adversarial audit harness) are approved by the user (「批准」, 2026-07-07). Consequence per audit doc section-10 sequencing: the AUDIT INSTRUMENT + calibration dry-run against the three hand-authored packages may now be BUILT — it precedes and is independent of any extractor; M3a-M3e extractor build remains NO_GO until the frozen criteria pass on a real run. Execution model: user directed the build to Opus (token economy); Fable stays planner/reviewer/commit-gate per the standing delegation doctrine.
provenance: user message 2026-07-07 「批准 給opus做吧 省token」

decision: Machine-readable-verbatim convention (mhc 3cc5c5d): quoted_primary cards MUST carry their verbatim text in a machine-checkable field (quoted_primary_text; schema-legal today via additionalProperties, structural requirement recorded as v0.8 proposal section-12.5). A verbatim assertion is never satisfied by prose embedding. The soft alternative (locator+carrier suffices, no field) was REJECTED: it would exempt the highest-risk attribution class from the verbatim audit — the exact fabrication class the instrument exists to kill. Trigger: review-C1 correctly closed a binding-mode empty-quote false-pass, which surfaced that the hand-authored fpe_ev007 (verbatim text in prose only) made spec 4C-rule-2 and spec 10.2 mutually unsatisfiable. fpe_ev007 migrated (capped-contiguous 2-sentence excerpt; no stitching of non-adjacent sentences; content unchanged; mhc 6fd6f61).
provenance: Design author decision under standing user delegation; surfaced by adversarial code review round 1; reviewer verified the migration clean in round 2

decision: Phase-3 source set FROZEN (commit A). Held-out subject = Jeff Bezos (user-chosen for domain-generality stress vs the finance/tech shipped subjects). Frozen set = 35 sources: calibration 22 (the shipped packages, designation inherited from hand-authored source_index) + held-out 13 fresh Bezos sources (I5), 10 FETCHABLE / 3 UNFETCHABLE across 6 source classes. Every held-out I1 probe orchestrator-executed via read-only WebFetch GET, status recorded verbatim. Satisfies protocol section-4 minimums (>=2 unfetchable, >=1 compilation [Invent and Wander book], >=1 press-carried-primary [Forbes Type1/Type2], >=3 classes). NO-SWAP now binding (protocol section-7): no add/remove/re-designate; failed run = NO_GO not re-freeze. Two orchestrator judgment calls surfaced to user + accepted: (1) 2 PDFs (2015 letter Q4 + EconClub) designated UNFETCHABLE because unparseable by the research-env WebFetch (honest env-capability designation, x.com-402 precedent); (2) held-out fetchable n=10 kept clean/official rather than padded with third-party mirrors.
provenance: user AskUserQuestion 2026-07-07: subject=Jeff Bezos, then freeze-authorization=「凍結現狀(mint commit A)」. Executed by Opus.

decision: APPROVED FUTURE ARC (deferred): a tool-track adversarial audit — the tools version of Phase-3. Hold tool/MCP/skill cards to the same frozen-set + adversarial-audit + zero-fabrication bar the evidence layer gets, instead of the current lighter discipline (phc recommend-tools -> computed permission/risk from proxies -> human vet). The arc would add: a pre-registered frozen tool set (tool analogue of source_set.yaml), an adversarial tool-card audit (does the MCP/skill exist at the cited registry? is computed permission/risk defensible from the proxy signals? any uncited capability claim?), and a zero-fabrication criterion mirroring criterion 2. SEQUENCED STRICTLY AFTER the evidence layer (build plan B0-B7) ships GO — do NOT start earlier. Rationale for deferring not dropping: tool discovery is metadata-only + already human-vetted (lower fabrication surface than auto-generated cited evidence); the evidence layer is the higher-risk still-NO_GO piece and takes priority.
provenance: user 2026-07-07 「要 但先把原本的證據層先搞定 再回來做」. Recorded in mhc docs/plans/phase3_extractor_build_plan.md §6 + here.

decision: Tool-track adversarial-audit arc (AD-026 deferred arc): DESIGN ratified GO after 2 phase-review rounds (mhc 6d178ee). Core decision is an HONEST NARROWING: the tool track CANNOT produce evidences external-truth verified-ratio (a risk SCORE has no external ground truth - the R1-R7 proxy table IS its definition). So the tool audits correctness bars are T-EXIST (fabricated-tool existence, ONLY over snapshot-able registries: MCP Registry / Glama / ClawHub via /api/v1/skills/{slug}) + T-CEIL (permission-ceiling honesty + capability-citation); T-INTEG (score recomputes from the frozen raw blob) is labelled INTEGRITY-not-correctness (tamper/drift detection, since re-running the same pure assess_candidate is reproducible by identity - the grader==generator tautology, stated openly). Reuses shipped assess_candidate + classify_permission + the 5 read-only registry adapters; never installs/executes (existing-credential read like GITHUB_TOKEN lawful). Both review rounds caught real orchestrator factual errors (v1 named a nonexistent compute_risk + a nonexistent rubric file + a calibration set resolving at no registry; v2 misclassified ClawHub as search-only + a source-relocation hole) - all fixed. BUILD sequenced strictly AFTER the evidence layer ships GO (still NO_GO pending the real Bezos --live + LLM + human S4 run).
provenance: user 開始/重設計 2026-07-07; 2 independent Opus phase-reviews; design-only, no code
